compiled_state.title: RED eval: add REPLAN_ESCALATE emission test to implementation-plan promptfooconfig
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Context
Story ca76-bb4e: RED eval task for the REPLAN_ESCALATE signal emission logic. This eval test must FAIL against the unmodified SKILL.md (before Task 4 adds emission logic), then PASS after.

This task must be completed (RED state established) before the implementation task runs.

## TDD Requirement (RED)
Add a new test case to `plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml` that:
1. Prompts implementation-plan with a story whose success criteria are contradicted by codebase state
2. Asserts the output contains `REPLAN_ESCALATE: brainstorm` and an EXPLANATION
3. This test is RED: it FAILS against the current SKILL.md (which has no REPLAN_ESCALATE logic)

## What To Do
Add a new test entry to `plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml` with:
- description: "Emits REPLAN_ESCALATE when success criteria cannot be satisfied"
- provider: claude-sonnet-4-6
- A prompt that gives a story whose SC are contradicted (example: story asks to 'add OAuth login' but the context explains OAuth was already built and then deleted by a previous story, leaving a permanent architectural decision to never use OAuth — success criteria say 'user can log in via OAuth' but the codebase and closed tickets make this impossible to satisfy)
- assert with `type: llm-rubric` checking: (1) output contains REPLAN_ESCALATE, (2) contains 'brainstorm' as the escalation target, (3) includes an EXPLANATION describing the contradiction, (4) does NOT contain STATUS:complete or STATUS:blocked

Read `plugins/dso/docs/contracts/replan-escalate-signal.md` first to understand the exact signal format to assert against.

## Files to Modify
- `plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml` (add test case)

## Acceptance Criteria

### AC1: New test case added to promptfooconfig.yaml
```
Verify: grep -c 'REPLAN_ESCALATE' plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml | grep -qv '^0$' && echo PASS
```

### AC2: Test case uses llm-rubric assertion
```
Verify: grep -A20 'REPLAN_ESCALATE' plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml | grep -q 'llm-rubric' && echo PASS
```

### AC3: Promptfooconfig yaml is valid (no syntax errors)
```
Verify: python3 -c "import yaml; yaml.safe_load(open('plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml'))" && echo PASS
```

### AC4: No TODO markers in new test case
```
Verify: grep -A50 'Emits REPLAN_ESCALATE' plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml | grep -qv 'TODO' && echo PASS
```
